title: AI_OS Night Supervisor Effector Intent
description: Wire contract between the canonical Codex V2 spine and the Claude effector layer. An effector intent is a PROPOSAL ONLY, derived from an approved packet_routing_contract.v1. It never executes by itself. Execution requires, all at once: kill_switch_clear, effector_actionable, capability_allowed, execution_enabled, env_apply_armed, and contract_cleared (the spine already judged approval + lock). The effector layer never re-reads the approval inbox or re-scans locks; approval_officer and lock_manager own that authority.

effector.description: Logical effector name. Maps to exactly one hand-script.

effector_script.description: Repo-relative path of the PowerShell hand-script this intent would invoke.

args.description: Named arguments passed to the effector script.

blocked_by_default.description: Always true. Only the dispatcher, with all gates satisfied, may override at run time.

source_contract.description: The Codex spine verdict this intent trusts. References packet_routing_contract.v1. The effector layer does not re-derive these.
